input: Predict immunotherapy response for: NSCLC adenocarcinoma, TMB 28 mut/Mb, PD-L1 TPS 80%, MSS (microsatellite stable), no STK11/PTEN loss. Treatment-naive. ECOG 1.

expected_details.rationale: TMB-H + PD-L1 high = strong dual biomarker support for ICI monotherapy

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: Cutaneous melanoma, TMB 45 mut/Mb, MSI-H (dMMR confirmed), PD-L1 TPS 30%, BRAF V600E present but not targeting BRAF. No resistance gene mutations.

expected_details.should_note: MSI-H + TMB-H provides strong independent biomarker support

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: Colorectal cancer (CRC), MSS, TMB 4 mut/Mb, PD-L1 TPS 0%. No POLE/POLD1 mutations. Prior FOLFOX + bevacizumab.

expected_details.rationale: MSS CRC is prototypically ICI-resistant; no biomarker support

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: NSCLC adenocarcinoma, TMB 15 mut/Mb, PD-L1 TPS 60%, MSS. STK11 (LKB1) loss-of-function mutation confirmed. KRAS G12C co-mutation.

expected_details.should_note: STK11 loss is a strong negative predictor of ICI response in NSCLC despite otherwise favorable biomarkers
expected_details.rationale: STK11 loss creates 'cold' immune microenvironment resistant to checkpoint blockade

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: Clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC), TMB 8 mut/Mb, PD-L1 TPS 15%, MSS. IMDC intermediate risk. No resistance gene mutations identified.

expected_details.should_note: RCC responds to ICI independent of TMB/PD-L1; combination IO+TKI is standard
expected_details.rationale: ccRCC is immunogenic; traditional biomarkers less predictive; combination therapy preferred

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), TMB 2 mut/Mb, PD-L1 TPS 0%, MSS. KRAS G12D, TP53 R175H. Dense desmoplastic stroma.

expected_details.rationale: PDAC is prototypically immune-cold; no biomarker support for ICI

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: Endometrial carcinoma, POLE exonuclease domain mutation (P286R), TMB 232 mut/Mb, MSS (by IHC — note: POLE-mutant tumors may not be MSI-H), PD-L1 TPS 40%.

expected_details.pole_bonus: POLE ultramutated is a strong positive predictor
expected_details.should_note: POLE ultramutated endometrial has excellent prognosis and high ICI response rate despite MSS status

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: Gastric adenocarcinoma, EBV-positive, TMB 12 mut/Mb, PD-L1 CPS 15, MSS. PIK3CA mutation present.

expected_details.should_note: EBV-positive gastric cancer has high PD-L1 expression and favorable ICI response

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: Triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC), TMB 6 mut/Mb, PD-L1 CPS 12, MSS. BRCA1 germline mutation. No TILs data available.

expected_details.should_note: KEYNOTE-522 established pembrolizumab + chemo in early TNBC; CPS >= 10 is relevant threshold

input: Predict immunotherapy response for: Small cell lung cancer (SCLC), extensive stage, TMB 22 mut/Mb, PD-L1 TPS 0%, MSS. No resistance gene data available.

expected_details.should_note: SCLC benefits from IO+chemo regardless of PD-L1 (IMpower133, CASPIAN); TMB less predictive in SCLC
